hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【WORLD】伊朗战争最新消息：特朗普称休战已“维持生命”，长期能源危机迫在眉睫；【CRYPTO】参议院银行委员会更新法案解决了稳定币奖励和 DeFi 问题，但回避了特朗普的加密货币利益冲突；【FINANCE】Anthropic 的神话引发了网络安全的“歇斯底里”。专家称威胁已经存在。

items.title: Iran War Updates: Long-Term Energy Crisis Looms as Trump Says Truce Is on ‘Life Support’
items.summary: Iran defended its demands for a peace deal and President Trump called them “garbage.” Mr. Trump said he wanted to suspend the federal gasoline tax, which would require congressional approval.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争最新消息：特朗普称休战已“维持生命”，长期能源危机迫在眉睫
items.summary_zh: 伊朗为其和平协议的要求辩护，特朗普总统称其为“垃圾”。特朗普表示，他希望暂停征收联邦汽油税，这需要国会批准。

items.title: Updated Senate Banking Committee bill tackles stablecoin rewards, DeFi but sidesteps Trump’s crypto conflicts of interest
items.summary: A fix to the ongoing discussions around stablecoin rewards and language on protecting software developers is in the updated legislative text.
items.title_zh: 参议院银行委员会更新法案解决了稳定币奖励和 DeFi 问题，但回避了特朗普的加密货币利益冲突
items.summary_zh: 更新的立法文本中修复了围绕稳定币奖励和保护软件开发人员的持续讨论。

items.title: Anthropic's Mythos set off a cybersecurity 'hysteria.' Experts say the threat was already here
items.summary: The arrival of Anthropic's Mythos jolted banks, software giants and governments into reckoning with a new era of cyber attacks. But the threat is already here.
items.title_zh: Anthropic 的神话引发了网络安全的“歇斯底里”。专家称威胁已经存在
items.summary_zh: Anthropic Mythos 的到来让银行、软件巨头和政府开始思考网络攻击的新时代。但威胁已经来临。

items.title: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support'
items.summary: The US president criticises an Iranian counteroffer to end the war, and says the month-long ceasefire is "unbelievably weak".
items.title_zh: 特朗普称伊朗停火需要“巨大的生命支持”
items.summary_zh: 美国总统批评伊朗提出的结束战争的还价，并表示为期一个月的停火“软弱得令人难以置信”。

items.title: Crypto markets stalls before inflation data as XRP, SOL rebuffed from key price levels
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for May 12, 2026
items.title_zh: 由于 XRP、SOL 被关键价格水平拒绝，加密货币市场在通胀数据公布前陷入停滞
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 5 月 12 日天气预报

items.title: Beyond IBIT: Bitcoin’s surprising link to sports betting ETF is getting harder to ignore
items.summary: The Roundhill Sports Betting & iGaming ETF (BETZ) and bitcoin share a strong positive correlation, with an interesting twist.
items.title_zh: 除了 IBIT：比特币与体育博彩 ETF 的惊人联系越来越难以忽视
items.summary_zh: Roundhill Sports Betting & iGaming ETF (BETZ) 和比特币有着很强的正相关性，但有一个有趣的转折。

items.title: Bitcoin miner MARA sold $1.5 billion of bitcoin as it shifts toward AI infrastructure
items.summary: While the miner said bitcoin remains its operational foundation, first-quarter results point to a company increasingly built around power, data centers and AI demand.
items.title_zh: 比特币矿商 MARA 出售 15 亿美元比特币，转向人工智能基础设施
items.summary_zh: 尽管该矿商表示比特币仍然是其运营基础，但第一季度的业绩表明该公司越来越多地围绕电力、数据中心和人工智能需求而建立。

items.title: 'Bitcoin transactions can be monitored’: Ray Dalio explains why central banks won’t touch BTC
items.summary: Ray Dalio joins the privacy debate, saying Bitcoin’s full transparency makes it less likely to be adopted by central banks.
items.title_zh: “比特币交易可以被监控”：Ray Dalio 解释为什么央行不会碰比特币
items.summary_zh: 雷·达利奥 (Ray Dalio) 加入了隐私辩论，他表示比特币的完全透明性使其不太可能被央行采用。

items.title: Spot XRP ETFs report largest single-day inflow since January, worth $26 million
items.summary: Bitrue Researcher Andri Fauzan Adziima said this 'quiet accumulation' signals institutional confidence in XRP.
items.title_zh: 现货 XRP ETF 报告自 1 月份以来最大单日资金流入，价值 2600 万美元
items.summary_zh: Bitrue 研究员 Andri Fauzan Adziima 表示，这种“安静的积累”标志着机构对 XRP 的信心。

items.title: Scaling Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber
items.summary: OpenAI expands Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber, helping verified defenders accelerate vulnerability research and protect critical infrastructure.
items.title_zh: 使用 GPT-5.5 和 GPT-5.5-Cyber​​ 扩展网络的可信访问
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过 GPT-5.5 和 GPT-5.5-Cyber​​ 扩展了网络可信访问，帮助经过验证的防御者加速漏洞研究并保护关键基础设施。

items.title: Enabling privacy-preserving AI training on everyday devices
items.summary: A new method could bring more accurate and efficient AI models to high-stakes applications like health care and finance, even in under-resourced settings.
items.title_zh: 在日常设备上启用保护隐私的人工智能训练
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以为医疗保健和金融等高风险应用带来更准确、更高效的人工智能模型，即使在资源贫乏的环境中也是如此。

items.title: JPMorgan Chase-led bank group reins in credit line to troubled KKR private credit fund as losses mount
items.summary: The KKR fund, often referred to by its ticker, FSK, has become one of the most visible fault lines in the private credit story.
items.title_zh: 由于损失不断增加，摩根大通领导的银行集团限制了陷入困境的 KKR 私人信贷基金的信贷额度
items.summary_zh: KKR 基金（通常以其股票代码 FSK 提及）已成为私人信贷故事中最明显的断层线之一。

items.title: Iran focus at Trump-Xi summit may delay progress on tariffs, rare earths
items.summary: Thanks to the Iran war, big issues for U.S. businesses like rare earths and supply chains may take a back seat on the agenda for the Trump-Xi summit.
items.title_zh: 特朗普与习近平峰会的焦点可能会推迟关税和稀土方面的进展
items.summary_zh: 由于伊朗战争，稀土和供应链等美国企业面临的重大问题可能在特习峰会议程上退居二线。

items.title: Kalshi traders see odds rising that a U.S.-Iran nuclear deal will be reached by 2027
items.summary: It comes after Axios reported on Wednesday that the two countries were nearing a one-page memo to end their war.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希交易员认为，美国与伊朗 2027 年达成核协议的可能性上升
items.summary_zh: 此前，Axios 周三报道称，两国即将签署一页备忘录来结束战争。

items.title: Ryan Cohen's mysterious bank letter backing GameStop's eBay bid reveals a big issue with deal
items.summary: The combined company would need to maintain an investment-grade credit profile, GameStop's mysterious financing letter said.
items.title_zh: 瑞安·科恩（Ryan Cohen）神秘的银行信件支持 GameStop 收购 eBay，揭示了交易中的一个大问题
items.summary_zh: GameStop 神秘的融资信称，合并后的公司需要保持投资级信用状况。

items.title: Canvas hack: company pays criminals to delete students' stolen data
items.summary: The company behind Canvas says it has "reached an agreement" with the hackers who disrupted thousands of colleges and universities.
items.title_zh: Canvas 黑客：公司付钱给犯罪分子，让他们删除学生被盗的数据
items.summary_zh: Canvas 背后的公司表示，它已经与扰乱数千所学院和大学的黑客“达成协议”。

items.title: Texas accuses Netflix of spying on users, including children
items.summary: The lawsuit comes amid increased scrutiny over platform features like auto-play that deliver endless content to users.
items.title_zh: 德克萨斯州指控 Netflix 监视用户，包括儿童
items.summary_zh: 此次诉讼发生之际，人们对自动播放等向用户提供无尽内容的平台功能进行了越来越严格的审查。

items.title: Snack giant switches to black and white packaging as Iran war hits ink supplies
items.summary: The effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz has severely disrupted global supplies of energy and petrochemicals.
items.title_zh: 由于伊朗战争影响墨水供应，零食巨头转向黑白包装
items.summary_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡的有效关闭严重扰乱了全球能源和石化产品的供应。

items.title: No sign of larger hantavirus outbreak, says UN health agency
items.summary: The situation could still change and there might be more confirmed cases, warns the head of the World Health Organization.
items.title_zh: 联合国卫生机构称，没有迹象表明存在更大规模的汉坦病毒爆发
items.summary_zh: 世界卫生组织负责人警告说，情况仍可能发生变化，可能会出现更多确诊病例。

items.title: Pakistan struck a rehab centre and killed 269 Afghans. Their families want to know why
items.summary: There are calls to investigate the 16 March airstrike - which the UN says likely killed more - as a war crime.
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦袭击了一个康复中心，造成 269 名阿富汗人死亡。他们的家人想知道原因
items.summary_zh: 有人呼吁将 3 月 16 日的空袭——联合国称这次空袭可能造成更多人死亡——作为战争罪进行调查。

items.title: Ex-Philippine leader Duterte's drug war enforcer escapes ICC arrest
items.summary: Senator Ronald "Bato" Dela Rosa, a former national police chief, has sought refuge in the senate.
items.title_zh: 菲律宾前领导人杜特尔特的反毒战执行者逃脱了国际刑事法院的逮捕
items.summary_zh: 前国家警察局长、参议员罗纳德·“巴托”·德拉·罗莎已在参议院寻求庇护。

items.title: Xi Is Poised to Press Trump on Arms Sales to Taiwan
items.summary: Beijing has called Taiwan the “core of China’s core interests.” Xi Jinping is likely to focus on getting President Trump to slow approval of more weapons for the self-governing island.
items.title_zh: 习近平准备就对台军售问题向特朗普施压
items.summary_zh: 北京称台湾是“中国核心利益的核心”。习近平可能会集中精力让特朗普总统放慢批准为这个自治岛屿提供更多武器的速度。

items.title: The War in Iran Is Another Blow to Russia’s Credibility. Or Is It?
items.summary: Despite its long slog in Ukraine and the loss of former allies like Syria, Russia is benefiting from costly energy, a clever narrative and America’s own failure to achieve a quick victory.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争是对俄罗斯信誉的又一次打击。或者是吗？
items.summary_zh: 尽管在乌克兰问题上长期举步维艰，并失去了叙利亚等前盟友，但俄罗斯仍受益于昂贵的能源、巧妙的叙述以及美国自身未能取得快速胜利的失败。

items.title: Video Shows Philippine Senator Outrunning Agents and Avoiding I.C.C. Warrant
items.summary: Video shows Senator Ronald dela Rosa, who is wanted by the International Criminal Court over Rodrigo Duterte’s drug war, dashing into the Philippine Senate.
items.title_zh: 视频显示菲律宾参议员超越特工并避开国际刑事法院保证
items.summary_zh: 视频显示，因罗德里戈·杜特尔特反毒战争而被国际刑事法院通缉的参议员罗纳德·德拉·罗莎冲进菲律宾参议院。

items.title: Russia Keeps Attacking U.S. Firms in Ukraine. The White House Is Silent.
items.summary: Facilities tied to Coca-Cola, Cargill, Mondelez and others appear to have been deliberately hit. The Trump administration’s muted response has raised concerns.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯不断攻击在乌克兰的美国公司。白宫一片寂静。
items.summary_zh: 与可口可乐、嘉吉、亿滋等公司相关的设施似乎遭到了故意袭击。特朗普政府的低调回应引发了担忧。

items.title: Is France’s Centrist Leader Trying to Weatherproof It From the Far Right?
items.summary: President Emmanuel Macron has appointed a string of allies who will remain in critical state positions after next year’s presidential election, and who could thwart a far-right successor.
items.title_zh: 法国中间派领导人是否试图抵御极右翼的影响？
items.summary_zh: 总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙任命了一系列盟友，他们将在明年的总统选举后继续担任关键的国家职务，并可能阻止极右翼的继任者。

items.title: Anthropic warns against unauthorized stock exposure as token markets imply trillion-dollar valuation
items.summary: The AI firm says investors should assume indirect access to its private shares is invalid, and transfers of its stock or interests in its stock will not be recognized.
items.title_zh: Anthropic 警告不要未经授权的股票风险敞口，因为代币市场意味着数万亿美元的估值
items.summary_zh: 这家人工智能公司表示，投资者应该假设间接获得其私人股票是无效的，并且其股票或股票权益的转让将不被认可。

items.title: Bernstein maintains $190 Circle price target as $222 million ARC presale cushions rate pressure
items.summary: Bernstein maintained its $190 Circle target, citing ARC presale proceeds, USDC growth, and expanding stablecoin payments infrastructure.
items.title_zh: Bernstein 维持 190 美元的 Circle 价格目标，2.22 亿美元的 ARC 预售缓解了利率压力
items.summary_zh: Bernstein 维持了 190 美元的 Circle 目标，理由是 ARC 预售收益、USDC 增长以及稳定币支付基础设施的扩展。

items.title: Ark Invest buys $5.5 million worth of Circle shares as stock jumps 16% on Q1 earnings
items.summary: Circle's shares closed up 15.91% at $131.76 on Monday after the stablecoin issuer disclosed its first-quarter 2026 results.
items.title_zh: Ark Invest 购买了价值 550 万美元的 Circle 股票，该股第一季度收益上涨 16%
items.summary_zh: 稳定币发行商 Circle 公布 2026 年第一季度业绩后，周一收盘上涨 15.91%，至 131.76 美元。

items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 85。

items.title: How ChatGPT adoption broadened in early 2026
items.summary: ChatGPT adoption surged in Q1 2026, with fastest growth among users over 35 and more balanced gender usage, signaling broader mainstream AI adoption.
items.title_zh: ChatGPT 的采用率如何在 2026 年初扩大
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 的采用率在 2026 年第一季度激增，其中 35 岁以上的用户增长最快，性别使用更加平衡，这表明主流 AI 的采用更加广泛。

items.title: Running Codex safely at OpenAI
items.summary: How OpenAI runs Codex securely with sandboxing, approvals, network policies, and agent-native telemetry to support safe and compliant coding agent adoption.
items.title_zh: 在 OpenAI 上安全运行 Codex
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何通过沙箱、审批、网络策略和代理本机遥测技术安全地运行 Codex，以支持安全且合规的编码代理采用。

items.title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
items.summary: Google’s sharing 20 fun facts to celebrate Google Translate turning 20, from its roots as a 2006 AI experiment to supporting almost 250 languages today.
items.title_zh: 庆祝 Google 翻译 20 周年：有趣的事实、提示和值得尝试的新功能
items.summary_zh: 谷歌分享 20 个有趣的事实来庆祝谷歌翻译成立 20 周年，从 2006 年的人工智能实验到如今支持近 250 种语言。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.
items.title_zh: 人和机器玩的游戏：理清战略推理以推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: The MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab launches to shape the future of AI and quantum computing
items.summary: Building on a long-standing MIT–IBM collaboration, the new lab will chart the convergence of AI, algorithms, and quantum computing.
items.title_zh: MIT-IBM 计算研究实验室成立，塑造人工智能和量子计算的未来
items.summary_zh: 新实验室建立在 MIT 与 IBM 长期合作的基础上，将绘制人工智能、算法和量子计算的融合图。

items.title: A faster way to estimate AI power consumption
items.summary: The “EnergAIzer” method generates reliable results in seconds, enabling data center operators to efficiently allocate resources and reduce wasted energy.
items.title_zh: 更快地估算 AI 功耗的方法
items.summary_zh: “EnergAIzer”方法可在几秒钟内生成可靠的结果，使数据中心运营商能够有效地分配资源并减少能源浪费。

items.title: Live Updates: Britain’s Starmer Says He Will Not Resign
items.summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer vowed to continue in office as he met with cabinet members. Dozens of Labour Party lawmakers had urged him to step down after heavy losses in local elections.
items.title_zh: 实时更新：英国斯塔默表示他不会辞职
items.summary_zh: 总理基尔·斯塔默在会见内阁成员时誓言继续留任。在地方选举中惨败后，数十名工党议员敦促他下台。

items.title: Bitcoin hovers above key support as equities, crypto retreat
items.summary: Bitcoin and ether fell as escalating Middle East tensions lifted oil and the dollar, though BTC continued to hold above a key bull market level.
items.title_zh: 随着股市和加密货币的撤退，比特币徘徊在关键支撑位上方
items.summary_zh: 随着中东紧张局势升级，油价和美元走高，比特币和以太币下跌，但比特币继续保持在关键牛市水平之上。

items.title: ETH/BTC ratio falls to 10-month low as ether continues to underperform bitcoin
items.summary: Widely followed crypto market gauge signals weakening risk appetite as investors continue favoring bitcoin over ether.
items.title_zh: 由于以太币继续跑输比特币，ETH/BTC 比率跌至 10 个月低点
items.summary_zh: 受到广泛关注的加密货币市场指标表明，随着投资者继续青睐比特币而不是以太币，风险偏好正在减弱。

items.title: Aave launches binding Arbitrum vote to move $71 million in disputed ETH
items.summary: Arbitrum delegates begin the binding governance process to transfer disputed exploit funds to Aave, while North Korean terrorism creditors continue fighting for ownership in Manhattan court
items.title_zh: Aave 发起具有约束力的仲裁投票，以转移 7100 万美元有争议的 ETH
items.summary_zh: 仲裁代表开始有约束力的治理程序，将有争议的剥削资金转移给 Aave，而朝鲜恐怖主义债权人则继续在曼哈顿法院争夺所有权

items.title: Bhutan government moves another 100 BTC as 2026 bitcoin outflows top $230 million: Arkham
items.summary: Bhutan appears to have sold around $50 million in BTC per month this year, Arkham said, but still has $252 million in bitcoin remaining.
items.title_zh: 2026 年比特币流出量将达到 2.3 亿美元，不丹政府又转移了 100 个 BTC：Arkham
items.summary_zh: Arkham 表示，不丹今年似乎每月出售了约 5000 万美元的比特币，但仍有 2.52 亿美元的比特币剩余。

items.title: Bitcoin Ordinals explorer Ord.io to shut down alongside trading app Zap
items.summary: Bitcoin Ordinals browser Ord.io and its associated consumer app Zap will shut down on June 1, according to announcements published on X.
items.title_zh: 比特币 Ordinals 浏览器 Ord.io 将与交易应用程序 Zap 一起关闭
items.summary_zh: 根据 X 上发布的公告，比特币 Ordinals 浏览器 Ord.io 及其相关消费者应用程序 Zap 将于 6 月 1 日关闭。

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Making the case for curiosity-driven science
items.summary: President Sally Kornbluth spoke in front of a packed crowd about growing challenges to the U.S. research ecosystem as funding for America’s top research universities becomes increasingly strained.
items.title_zh: 为好奇心驱动的科学提供理由
items.summary_zh: 萨莉·科恩布鲁斯校长在拥挤的人群面前发表讲话，谈到随着美国顶尖研究型大学的资金日益紧张，美国研究生态系统面临着日益严峻的挑战。

items.title: Solving the “Whac-a-mole dilemma”: A smarter way to debias AI vision models
items.summary: A new debiasing technique called WRING avoids creating or amplifying biases that can occur with existing debiasing approaches.

items.summary_zh: 一种名为 WRING 的新去偏技术可避免产生或放大现有去偏方法可能出现的偏差。

items.title: MIT scientists build the world’s largest collection of Olympiad-level math problems, and open it to everyone
items.summary: New dataset of 30,000-plus competition math problems from 47 countries gives AI researchers a harder test — and students worldwide a better training ground.

items.summary_zh: 来自 47 个国家的 30,000 多个竞赛数学问题的新数据集为人工智能研究人员提供了更难的测试，也为世界各地的学生提供了更好的训练场。

items.title: Series of court decisions weaken Democrats' odds of winning the House
items.summary: A U.S. Supreme Court decision and ruling from the Virginia Supreme Court have altered the redistricting outlook, hurting the chance that House control will flip.
items.title_zh: 一系列法院判决削弱了民主党赢得众议院的可能性
items.summary_zh: 美国最高法院的一项决定和弗吉尼亚州最高法院的裁决改变了选区重新划分的前景，损害了众议院控制权翻转的机会。

items.title: Michael Burry is not a believer: 'For any stocks going parabolic reduce positions almost entirely'
items.summary: Michael Burry said investors should "reject greed" as enthusiasm around artificial intelligence and momentum-driven trades pushes valuations sharply higher.
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 不相信：“对于任何呈抛物线走势的股票，头寸几乎都会减少”
items.summary_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 表示，投资者应该“拒绝贪婪”，因为对人工智能和动力驱动交易的热情推动估值大幅上涨。

items.title: How much further does this Teflon market have to go? Here's what traders say
items.summary: Traders on prediction markets platform Kalshi place a more than 50% chance that the S&P 500 crosses 8,000 in 2026.
items.title_zh: 特氟龙市场还有多远的路要走？这是贸易商的说法

items.title: Michael Burry says the market today feels like 'the last months of the 1999-2000 bubble'
items.summary: "Stocks are not up or down because of jobs or consumer sentiment," Burry wrote. "Feeling like the last months of the 1999-2000 bubble."
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 表示，今天的市场感觉就像“1999-2000 年泡沫的最后几个月”
items.summary_zh: “股市上涨或下跌并不是因为就业或消费者信心，”伯里写道。 “感觉就像 1999-2000 年泡沫的最后几个月。”

items.summary_zh: 她在一次欧盟峰会上表示，专家小组将于 7 月份就如何保护未成年人上网制定措施。

items.title: France seeks to move beyond colonial ties by meeting African leaders in Kenya
items.summary: In a first since these meetings started in the 1970s, this move reflects a change in France's thinking.

items.summary_zh: 这是自 20 世纪 70 年代召开这些会议以来的第一次，此举反映了法国思维的变化。

items.title: What Middle Powers Fear from the Trump-Xi Summit
